name: postey
title: Postey
description: Create and manage social media drafts on Postey for X and LinkedIn.
author: postey

commands.name: create-draft
commands.title: New Draft
commands.subtitle: Postey
commands.description: Create a draft for one or more platforms in a social set.

commands.name: drafts
commands.title: View Drafts
commands.subtitle: Postey
commands.description: View unpublished drafts for a social set.

commands.name: view-scheduled
commands.title: View Scheduled
commands.subtitle: Postey
commands.description: View scheduled drafts for a social set.

commands.name: view-posted
commands.title: View Published
commands.subtitle: Postey

commands.name: social-sets
commands.title: Search Social Sets
commands.subtitle: Postey

tools.name: create-draft
tools.title: Create Draft
tools.description: Create a new social media draft on Postey. Provide either content (full draft text) or prompt (idea to generate). Use --- on its own line to split threads. Supports X (Twitter) and LinkedIn.

tools.name: list-drafts
tools.title: List Drafts
tools.description: List unpublished, scheduled, or published drafts from Postey.

tools.name: list-social-sets
tools.title: List Social Sets
tools.description: List available Postey social sets (accounts/profiles) the user can post to.

tools.name: schedule-draft
tools.title: Schedule Draft
tools.description: Schedule an existing Postey draft for a specific date and time.

ai.instructions: You help users create and manage social media drafts on Postey. When creating a draft, always call create-draft; if you have exact draft text, pass it in content, otherwise pass the idea in prompt and let the tool generate the draft. The account and platforms are resolved automatically — do NOT call list-social-sets before creating a draft, and do NOT ask the user which platforms to target unless they explicitly mention one. For threads, separate posts with --- on its own line inside content. When scheduling, call list-drafts first to get the draft ID and social_set_id.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Postey API Key
preferences.description: Get your key at postey.ai → Settings → API
